text: On disk for this project: **61 top-level transcripts** (+1 in the Work dir). The other ~54 `*.jsonl` under that project dir are **subagent sidechains** (`<session>/subagents/…`), which capture deliberately excludes (`capture.rs:48`). They were never meant to be mined. So the real main-thread corpus is ~61, of which ~50 were processed at some point — decent coverage, not an enumeration gap. Wherever your 253 comes from (sidechains, TENEX, other project dirs), it's not 253 captureable conversations for *this* wiki.
